reviews.review_description: This game is a lot of fun. It recommends a swivel chair and as do I. If you have one I highly recommend this game. It is such a good time. You follow this little person and you go through a maze of tunnels circling around collecting and high-fiving and just having lots of fun. I think you should check it out.

reviews.review_title: Neat idea, my body says NO
reviews.review_description: I enjoyed it a lot for about 60 seconds. And even though I'm not a big motion sickness sufferer (I play first person shooters all the time without problem), there's something about this game that made me feel horrendously ill almost immediately. I bet it's so fun for people who can stomach it, but oh man. Also I think putting the training sequence inside of a tunnel is a horrific mistake on the developers' part. The trailer showed open spaces, which would probably have been much more tolerable. But there's no way I'm going to try it again now!

reviews.review_title: People with motion sickness, please dont
reviews.review_description: Got motion sickness 🤢🤢🤢🤢🤢🤢, but the graphics is awesome

reviews.review_title: Fun movement and rhythm based game!
reviews.review_description: Great tunes! And for once I can enjoy a VR game without having to stand up.
This is one of the best movement games ever. Please keep adding levels!

This has become one of my favorite games to show off to friends.    The spinning motion is really fun and flows well with the music.   The developers have a great understanding of how to move the player back and forth to avoid actually getting dizzy.    I originally had issues playing it on my quest 3 but I emailed them and they dove right in and fixed it, keeping in constant contact until it worked flawlessly.  I can't wait to see what they come up with next!

reviews.review_title: Funny but need improvement and tracks
reviews.review_description: The game is funny, the elements to hit along the tune are perfectly in sync. check my gameplay/review here: https://youtu.be/tf2J-D11WZo

Only one complaint I can’t swifle in my chair so wish somehow u can turn with controller and this game would b perfect and I don’t play rhythm games but must say like this game was made big big fan now 🥰

Sitting down you feel weightless as you adventure in space. You turn/sometimes spin in your seat to follow the track. At the same time you are catching all kinds of things and drumming and even flying to the music. Certain tracks are tough and it feels like a fitness game. I have been playing daily. Thank you!!

I'll be honest. I don't usually play rhythm based games. This game looked interesting and I figured I'd give it a shot. Smart choice! I absolutely love the feel of this game. It feels like your really gliding as you make your way through the course. The space atmosphere fits this game perfectly. Each course is unique and a blast to glide through. Everything about this game just works perfectly. I hope the team adds more levels as time goes on. Fantastic job!

Your lower half follows the track, leaving your hands completely free to do all kinds of things. Genius move! 

The characters are so cool & funny. Rather than shoot, you high five aliens and then dance with them!!  This game is Awesome. Thank you for the hard work.
Innovative game with great graphics and fun music!
